description.chinese: 一把生锈但仍然锋利的剑。
description.pinyin: Yī bǎ shēngxiù dàn réngrán fēnglì de jiàn.
description.english: A rusty but still sharp sword.

description.chinese: 一个华丽的金杯，散发着古老的魔法光芒。
description.pinyin: Yī gè huálì de jīn bēi, sànfā zhe gǔlǎo de mófǎ guāngmáng.
description.english: A magnificent golden chalice glowing with ancient magic.

description.chinese: 一瓶红色的药水，散发着草药的气味。
description.pinyin: Yī píng hóngsè de yàoshuǐ, sànfā zhe cǎoyào de qìwèi.
description.english: A red potion that smells of herbs.

description.pinyin: Yī bǎ shēngxiù de jiù yàoshi.

description.chinese: 一个结实的皮革背包，可以携带更多物品。
description.pinyin: Yī gè jiēshi de pígé bēibāo, kěyǐ xiédài gèng duō wùpǐn.
description.english: A sturdy leather backpack that allows carrying more items.

description.chinese: 一个附魔的背包，可以大幅增加携带容量。
description.pinyin: Yī gè fùmó de bēibāo, kěyǐ dàfú zēngjiā xiédài róngliàng.
description.english: An enchanted backpack that greatly increases carrying capacity.
